user.title: The Gym Group
user.description: Please enter your login credentials for The Gym Group. The advanced fields below only need changing if the official app version has been bumped and the API starts rejecting requests.

reauth.title: Re-authenticate
reauth.description: Your credentials for {username} are no longer valid. Please re-enter your password.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to The Gym Group API. Please check your network connection and try again.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid username or password. Please check your credentials and try again.
error.unknown: An unknown error occurred. Please check the logs.

abort.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please remove and re-add the integration.

init.title: Update The Gym Group Configuration
init.description: Update your stored credentials and (optionally) the transport / app-identity fields used to talk to the API.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to The Gym Group API.
error.unknown: An unknown error occurred. Please check the logs.

trigger_subtitle.capacity_above: When the number of people in the gym goes above a set value.
trigger_subtitle.capacity_below: When the number of people in the gym goes below a set value.
